name: Classic Vanilla Latte
description: An easy and simple vanilla latte recipe that uses homemade salted vanilla syrup and aeration for a texture better than most cafes.

step_sections.name: Salted vanilla syrup
steps: Into a carafe or bowl, add 200 g of sugar and 100 g of hot water.
Stir for about 15 seconds to dissolve the sugar.
Add 10 g of vanilla paste and stir again.
Add 0.5 g of kosher salt and stir.

step_sections.name: To cook and serve
steps: Add 0.5 fl oz of salted vanilla syrup to a pitcher, shaker, or cup.
Add a double shot of espresso.
Add 5 fl oz of lactose-free whole milk.
Using a handheld milk frother, froth the mixture near the top of the milk for about 15 seconds to aerate.
Pour the latte over a glass filled with ice.

notes:
I recommend making the syrup in batches that you'll use within a month. 

test.
